interactions.description: Aspirin may reduce the blood pressure lowering effect of Lisinopril. High doses of Aspirin can also increase the risk of kidney damage.
interactions.holisticNote: Requires monitoring of blood pressure and kidney function markers (Creatinine).

interactions.description: Increased risk of severe bleeding. Both drugs have anti-clotting effects.
interactions.holisticNote: Critical: Avoid combination unless specifically directed by a cardiologist.

interactions.description: May cause a life-threatening drop in blood pressure.
interactions.holisticNote: EMERGENCY: Do not take together. Can lead to fainting or heart attack.
Mental health medication interacting with pain medication. Can cause confusion, rapid heart rate, and fever.
